data.title: i think the assessmentserviceimpl is doing too ...

content.text: i think the assessmentserviceimpl is doing too much than it should. would it be a great idea to fully separate the concerns, for instance if we had optionService, questionService and they perform the crud operations respectively but will interact with the assessmentserviceimpl. wolud that be a good approach?
